name: Wait-Event

options.name: -SourceIdentifier
options.description: Specifies the source identifier that this cmdlet waits for events. By default, `Wait-Event` waits for any event.

name: -Timeout
-TimeoutSec
options.description: Specifies the maximum time, in seconds, that `Wait-Event` waits for the event to occur. The default, -1, waits indefinitely. The timing starts when you submit the `Wait-Event` command.

description: Waits until a particular event is raised before continuing to run.
